name: doc-master
description: Documentation diagnostic and Architecture Decision Record (ADR) expert. PROACTIVELY activate for: (1) ANY new documentation file being created, (2) requests to 'document a decision' or 'write an ADR', (3) review or audit of existing ADRs / decision logs / design docs, (4) repos with docs/ or architecture/ directories where the user mentions adding governance, (5) detecting documentation drift, (6) cleanup of stale design docs, (7) choosing between ADR vs RFC vs design doc vs runbook vs how-to vs reference vs explanation vs tutorial vs code comment. Provides: the 'is this architecturally significant?' diagnostic, Nygard / MADR (short and long) / Y-statement template selection, canonical ADR status lifecycle (Proposed -> Accepted -> Superseded/Deprecated/Rejected), append-only immutability and supersession discipline, the Diátaxis-aware alternatives catalog (tutorial / how-to / reference / explanation), ADR anti-pattern detection (drift, non-decisions, duplication, missing re-evaluation triggers), and the purpose/owner/audience/update-trigger rule that prevents docs from becoming noise. The plugin's value is avoiding unnecessary docs, not generating them.
